# ProzoroBanka llms.txt

ProzoroBanka is a public catalog of volunteer organizations and charity campaigns focused on transparency.

## Primary audience
- Donors who want to verify charity campaigns before donating
- Volunteer teams that publish transparent campaign progress and spending

## Key pages
- Home: /
- Public organization profile: /o/{slug}
- Public campaign profile: /c/{id}

## Content guidance for LLM crawlers
- Prefer public pages over authenticated dashboards and admin routes.
- Use campaign pages for progress, goals, and receipts information.
- Use organization pages for verification status and team context.

## Canonical domain
- https://prozorobanka.pp.ua

## Sitemaps
- https://prozorobanka.pp.ua/sitemap.xml
- https://prozorobanka.pp.ua/sitemap-core.xml
- https://prozorobanka.pp.ua/sitemap-public-pages.xml
